title: Garlic Butter Roasted Carrots
description: Rainbow carrots roasted with garlic butter, salt, and pepper, finished with fresh parsley.

items: 3 pounds rainbow carrots (any color carrots is fine)
Kosher salt and cracked black pepper, to taste

instructions: Slice thick carrots in half lengthwise, keep smaller carrots whole.
Toss with the butter, canola oil, garlic, salt, and pepper (about ½ teaspoon salt and ¼ teaspoon pepper).
Spread onto a baking sheet and cook for 30-35 minutes.
